• Register rotation after round 0 (L0081) matches the state-update rule (b←a, c←b, … h←g).  
• Round 20 L0350–L0355: verified S1 (0x5976EE3D), step1 (h+S1 = 0x6C7124F8, L0352) and step2 (step1+ch = 0x8FFDA673, L0353); step3 after adding K[20] gives 0xBDE6D2E2 as in L0354, and temp1 (L0355) is correct after adding W[20].  
• Round 63 L0952–L0957: recalculated S1 from e, got 0x21F0 0FEC matching L0952; step1 = h+S1 gives 0xC8C63D01 (L0954); step2, step3 and temp1 (L0955–L0957) all add up correctly.  
No mismatches were found; every small operation and dependent sum we recomputed agrees with the trace, so no single-bit tamper is present.
